title: likely() function in the ON clause of a LEFT JOIN results in incorrect result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(i INT PRIMARY KEY, x FLOAT, y TEXT, z BLOB);
CREATE TABLE t2(i INT, bool CHAR(1) NOT NULL CHECK(bool IN ('T', 'F')));
SELECT count(*) FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.i=t2.i AND t2.bool='T';
key_bug_features: likely() function in LEFT JOIN ON clause malfunctions
